vector_to_string.docstring:
Convert a vector to a consistent string format.
        
        This standardized utility function handles all vector formatting consistently
        to prevent the "invisible commas" issue and other formatting problems.
        
        Args:
            vector: List or array of numbers
            dimensions: Optional dimension to pad/clip to
            
        Returns:
            Properly formatted vector string

test_vector_storage_and_retrieval.docstring: Test storing and retrieving vector data.
